nodes.context: Japanese yakuza gang active in Kobe, devoted to illegal gambling.
Japanese yakuza syndicate that grew under Kazuo Taoka.

edges.evidence_quote: After World War II , they formed an alliance with the Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate
edges.context: Honda-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi formed an alliance after World War II.

edges.evidence_quote: the Honda-kai were soon absorbed into the Yamaguchi-gumi's ranks and ceased to be an independent operation
edges.context: Honda-kai was absorbed into Yamaguchi-gumi, ceasing independent operation.
